title: Cobblemon: Mega Showdown x Mega Stone recipes
description: Adds craftable Mega Stones to the "Cobblemon: Mega Showdown" mod
body:
This datapack reverts the change for Crystals always dropping a Raw Mega Stone and adds alternative recipes for mega stones for to the mod "Cobblemon: Mega Showdown".



Craft raw mega stones from those you found, but don't need, and color them the right way to get the Mega Stone you want:

![Raw Mega Stone recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f02b8717e82c52cde88020febe8d89627f26a494.png)

![Example recipe for specific Mega Stones](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc30f8ddde2886bb03bd0a6debc8b7ffa12fe5ca.png)



As of version 0.3+ Meteorite Evo Stones Ores can be put in Furnaces and Blast Furnaces:
![Example for smelting/blasting Meteorite Evo Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bfdbcbbb98adb2b204c73b3f526cbf363778c568.png)

To use the datapack simply add it to the datapacks folder of your world.

For modpack devs: If you want to include the datapack for all worlds (already created, or fresh worlds), put it in the resource packs folder of your modpack and use the mod "Global Packs" to forceload it.
